name: @typeagent/copilot-plugin
description: TypeAgent integration plugin for GitHub Copilot CLI
author: Microsoft

scripts.test:direct: node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({sessionId:'test',timestamp:1234,cwd:'.',prompt:'list the playlists'}))" | cross-env TYPEAGENT_MODE=direct node dist/hooks/hook-router.js
scripts.test:mcp-redirect: node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({sessionId:'test',timestamp:1234,cwd:'.',prompt:'list the playlists'}))" | cross-env TYPEAGENT_MODE=mcp node dist/hooks/hook-router.js
